name: Videocon Industries Limited
summary: Videocon Industries Limited manufactures and distributes a range of consumer durables in India and internationally. The company operates through Consumer Electronics and Home Appliances, Crude Oil and Natural Gas, and Telecommunication segments. It offers televisions, refrigerators, washing machines, and air conditioners. The company also engages in the exploration and production of crude oil and natural gas. Videocon Industries Limited was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Aurangabad, India.
